strengths: Hands-on agentic AI infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at current role
Demonstrated distributed-systems depth with high-throughput, low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby
Fintech-adjacent experience spanning investment tech (RIDE Capital) and pricing optimization with algorithmic complexity (Optilyz)
concerns: No evidence of engineering leadership or team management at any scale — career arc is exclusively individual-contributor, including the current Staff Engineer title
Agentic AI exposure is confined to the current role started April 2025 with no demonstrated production multi-agent systems at consequential commercial scale
No regulated-environment or compliance experience and no depth in core fintech infrastructure primitives such as credit systems, payment rails, or real-time risk modeling

key_factors.factor: Shallow agentic AI production track record

response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically broad individual contributor with genuine strengths in distributed systems and an emerging interest in agentic tooling, but he does not meet the threshold for this CTO role on any of the non-negotiable dimensions: there is no record of managing or scaling an engineering organization, no production multi-agent AI systems delivered under commercial or regulatory constraints, and no meaningful fintech-infrastructure experience — all of which are hard requirements for an executive leading a regulated, agentic-AI-native fintech scale-up.
